description_long: This lamp features a striking open-frame design with a wireframe mannequin-like structure at its core, surrounded by a conical cage of red metallic bands. The bands are evenly spaced and descend from the top ring to the wide circular base, creating a visually dynamic and airy silhouette. The lamp stands on a solid, round black pedestal that provides stability and contrast to the otherwise open and geometric form. The central wireframe figure is detailed, with visible contours and mesh lines, giving the lamp a sculptural and modern appearance. The red bands add a bold accent and serve as both structural and decorative elements. The overall design is avant-garde, making it a statement piece suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern, sculptural floor lamp with a wireframe mannequin core and red conical metal bands, standing on a solid black base. The open-frame design and bold colors make it a striking decorative piece.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full wireframe mannequin and the symmetrical arrangement of red bands forming a conical cage.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlights the depth of the wireframe figure and the curvature of the red bands.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with the wireframe figure and red bands clearly visible, emphasizing the open structure.
description_view_3: Side profile accentuates the silhouette of the mannequin and the even spacing of the red bands around the lamp.
